memberdef.argsstring: (std::string commandTopic, std::string retPosTopic, std::string switchModeTopic, std::string retCartPosTopic, std::string cartStiffnessTopic, std::string jntStiffnessTopic, std::string ptpTopic, std::string commandStateTopic, std::string ptpReachedTopic, std::string addLoadTopic, std::string jntFrcTrqTopic, std::string cartFrcTrqTopic, std::string cartPtpTopic, std::string cartPtpReachedTopic, std::string cartMoveRfQueueTopic, std::string cartMoveWfQueueTopic, std::string cartPoseRfTopic, std::string setPtpThresh, std::string clockCycleTopic, std::string maxDistancePerCycleTopic, bool acceptCollisions, ros::NodeHandle node, KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< Kinematics > kin, KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< PathPlanner > planner, double sleepTime, double maxDistPerCycle)
memberdef.name: constructQueue

briefdescription.para: This method can be used to initialize custom parts of the ControlQueue implementation before the queue is started by startQueue().
This method can be used to add some additional initialization behavior when the queue is started. If no additional initialization is required, the method can be left empty.

The control queue collects the data about the actually executed trajectory during a point to point movement. This is automatically done by jointPtp(). jointPtp() calls the jointPtpInternal() function that actually plans the movement in joint space and executes it.
This method is called by the run() method once per clock cycle and actually submits the command about the next desired joint pose to the robot.

The control queue collects the data about the actually executed trajectory during a point to point movement. This is automatically done by cartesianPtp(). cartesianPtp() calls the cartPtpInternal() function that actually plans the movement in Cartesian space and executes it.
This method is called by the run() method once per clock cycle and actually submits the command about the next desired Cartesian pose to the robot.
This method is called by switchMode() and actually sends the control mode command to the robot.

This method determines, if the queue execetion should be stopped while ptp commands are executed (this is typically the case when ptp is done outside of the control queue implementation). If two different controls interfere it can result in dangerous behaviour.

simplesect.para: true if the queue should be stopped during ptp, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (StorageSingleton &storage, std::string deviceType, std::string armPrefix, ros::NodeHandle node, bool acceptCollisions=false, KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< Kinematics > kin=KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< Kinematics >(), KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< PathPlanner > planner=KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< PathPlanner >(), double sleepTime=-1.0, double maxDistPerCycle=-1.0)
memberdef.name: KukieControlQueue

briefdescription.para: Method is called whenever destroy event occurs and ensures safe and clean termination of the programm (e.g. stops robot)
Sets the maximum deviation in joint space that is tolerated for a point to point movement.
Changes the expected load data of the robot (e.g. can be used whenever robot picks up an object). Some robots might require this information in order to avoid control problems.

parameterdescription.para: mass of the picked up object
position of the objects center of gravity relative to the manipulator

memberdef.argsstring: (float cpstiffnessxyz, float cpstiffnessabc, float cpdamping, float cpmaxdelta, float maxforce, float axismaxdeltatrq)
memberdef.name: setStiffness

briefdescription.para: Sets certain stiffness parameters in cartesian space (if the robot supports this) according to a mass spring damper system model.

parameterdescription.para: stiffness of the robot in the cartesian space
stiffness of the rotational axis of the tool mounting point in cartesian space
damping of the robots axis in cartesian space
maximum allows deviation in cartesian space

memberdef.argsstring: (float cpstiffnessxyz, float cpstiffnessabc, float cpdamping, float cpmaxdelta, float maxforce, float axismaxdeltatrq, bool storePrevValues)
memberdef.name: setStiffness

briefdescription.para: Returns the current robot control mode (see switchMode())
Returns the robot name with escaped special characaters (e.g. white spaces)
Returns the robot joint names.
Returns joints if the robot is in command mode.

simplesect.para: The current joint pose of the robot

briefdescription.para: Returns the forces measured for the robot joints.

simplesect.para: The current forces measured at the robot joints (in Newton)

briefdescription.para: Returns the forces and torques measured at the robot end-effector.

simplesect.para: The current forces and torques (in Newton and Newton / meter)

briefdescription.para: Returns current robot position in cartesian space.

simplesect.para: current pose of the robot in Cartesian space

briefdescription.para: Contains an implementation of the control queue interface for robots supporting the IISKukie system. This interface is responsible for all communication the kukadu software stack and the robotic arm.
